chapter_title.ar: باب مَنْ حَكَمَ بِغَيْرِ مَا أَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلّ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 3 – The one who judges with other than what Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic Revealed

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/268)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/268)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ أَيُّ قَاضٍ قَضَى بَيْنَ اثْنَيْنِ فَأَخْطَأَ سَقَطَ أَبْعَدَ مِنَ السَّمَاءِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Abu Abdullah Al Momin, from Muawiya Bin Wahab who said,
‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘Whichever judge who judges between two, so he errs, falls from further than the sky’.
en.sarwar: 4. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from ‘Abd Allah al-Mu’min from Mu‘awiyah ibn Wahab who has narrated the following: “I once heard abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying, ‘Any judge who issues a judgment between the two and makes a mistake, he falls into a depth farther than the sky.’”
